prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 close-up background plate for scene 4 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample and defines the exact fibrous paper, muted mineral colors, restrained ink and handmade shadow language
Primary request: close view of the creek-bank work area with a broad flat grinding stone occupying the lower middle and flowing creek beyond it; the stone is empty so separate hands and iron-pestle layers can animate over it
Scene/backdrop: weathered rock, blurred paper-collage creek water, hints of bamboo reflection; no person, hands, iron object or sparks
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, layered paper relief, visible fibers, matte celadon, gray-brown and restrained ochre
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 macro-like framing; grinding stone surface clear and unobstructed; generous center area for the animated close-up layer; subtitle-safe lower edge
Lighting/mood: focused rhythmic calm, subtle warm contact area without actual sparks
Constraints: no people, hands, iron pestle, needle, text, watermark, logo, modern items or frame
Avoid: photoreal stone, glossy 3D, anime, cinematic lens flare, embedded motion blur, text-like marks
